enrichment.short_description:
ACELAB is a technology company based in New York, founded in 2019 or 2020 by a team of architects, including CEO Vardhan Mehta. The company focuses on improving the architecture and construction industry through its AI-powered platform, Materials Hub. This platform addresses inefficiencies in the building materials market by offering data-driven tools for architects, designers, and building professionals.

Materials Hub enables users to discover and compare building materials effectively. It interprets natural language queries to suggest suitable materials from a comprehensive database of over 100,000 products. The platform also facilitates collaboration among teams and integrates with design software like Revit, streamlining workflows. With over 20,000 architecture and design firms using Materials Hub, including many of the top firms in the U.S., ACELAB is committed to enhancing material selection and specification processes for better project outcomes.

By focusing on the unique challenges of AEC workflows, Nomic aims to save significant time for engineers and project teams, facilitating tasks such as RFP preparation, QA/QC reviews, and code compliance checks. Seev's core product is an AI-powered RFP platform that surfaces the most relevant public RFPs tailored to a user's business needs. It features a Webex bot that allows teams to analyze RFPs using natural language queries, switch projects, view details, and receive notifications for new opportunities. This platform is designed for proposal managers, bid teams, and sales professionals who handle government and private RFPs.

input_description: Automated email signature parsing and contact management tool that helps firms keep their CRM data updated without manual entry.

enrichment.raw_address: san diego, california, united states
enrichment.short_description:
SigParser is a Relationship Intelligence platform that connects to the tools you already use—like email and calendars—to automatically surface valuable insights about your business relationships. 

Using AI, SigParser builds complete, real-time profiles of the people and companies you engage with, helping you understand who knows who, how well, and what matters most.

Teams across industries use SigParser to reduce manual data entry, improve client visibility, and unlock the full value of their CRM with complete, current, and actionable relationship data.

input_description: A BIM consultancy and technology firm helping AEC companies implement digital transformation and complex BIM workflows.

enrichment.name: slantis
enrichment.raw_address: 4 Embarcadero Center, Suite 1400, San Francisco, California 94111, US
enrichment.short_description:
Slantis is a women-owned architecture and technology firm based in the United States, founded in 2016 by licensed architects Andy Robert and Mercedes Carriquiry. The company specializes in Building Information Modeling (BIM) production and consulting services for the architecture, engineering, and construction (AEC) industry. With a team of 51-200 employees, Slantis supports a diverse range of clients, including large architecture firms, construction companies, and niche practitioners.

The firm offers two main service categories: Architecture Production & Coordination and BIM Consulting. Their architecture services include BIM production through cloud-based technology, covering As-builts, Design Development, and Construction Documents. In BIM Consulting, Slantis provides customized support for BIM adoption, including training and workflow automation. The company is known for its technical expertise in tools like Revit and Dynamo, and it conducts focused projects to test design solutions in real architectural conditions. Slantis fosters a culture of Justice, Equity, Diversity, and Inclusion, with a significant representation of women in leadership roles.

input_description: Develops AI solutions for the structural engineering industry to automate design tasks and improve structural analysis efficiency.

enrichment.name: Structured AI
enrichment.raw_address: New York City, US
enrichment.short_description:
Structured AI is a UK-based startup focused on developing an AI workforce for construction design engineering. The company specializes in AI agents that automate quality control on technical documents and drawings within the Architecture, Engineering, and Construction (AEC) industry. Founded by AI researchers from Oxford University, Structured AI aims to address costly errors in construction design, such as clashes and code violations, which can lead to delays and increased costs.

The core offering is an AI-powered quality assurance platform that automates repetitive design engineering workflows. Key features include automated drawing reviews that identify inconsistencies and code issues, AI agents that learn company standards, and integration with CAD and BIM tools. The platform enhances collaboration and streamlines technical paperwork management, making it easier for engineers to focus on high-value tasks. Structured AI is backed by seed funding and has garnered trust from leading AEC firms, including Syska Hennessy Group.

enrichment.short_description:
TrebleHook is a CRM and project pursuit platform designed specifically for Architecture, Engineering, and Construction (AEC) firms. Launched in 2021 by TPM, a technology company with a long history in the AEC industry, TrebleHook enhances project lifecycles from pursuit to completion. It integrates with Salesforce to provide a centralized source of client and project data, replacing outdated tools like Excel and Outlook.

The platform offers features for project lifecycle management, relationship management, and customization to fit AEC workflows. It helps users identify profitable projects, supports decision-making with dashboards and reporting, and enhances collaboration among teams. TrebleHook is designed to improve efficiency, profitability, and compliance monitoring, making it a valuable tool for AEC professionals.

Headquartered in Greenville, South Carolina, TrebleHook operates with a small team and has been recognized as one of the most exciting startups in the area. Its pricing is tailored to meet the needs of AEC firms, making it accessible for various users in the industry.

enrichment.short_description:
Unanet is a provider of AI-first ERP and CRM software solutions designed for project-based businesses, including government contractors, architecture, engineering, and construction firms, as well as professional services organizations. Founded in 1988 and headquartered in Dulles, Virginia, Unanet emphasizes a people-first culture and offers an integrated platform that combines financials, projects, and customer relationships with automation and real-time insights.

The platform features user-friendly ERP and CRM solutions tailored for project lifecycle management, including tools for timesheets, project accounting, and resource planning. Unanet's cloud-based system supports over 4,000 customers, helping them turn data into actionable insights. The company is committed to customer success and innovation, with a focus on empowering teams and simplifying operations. Under the leadership of CEO Craig Halliday, Unanet continues to grow and adapt to the needs of its clients.

input_description: An AI-driven platform focusing on enhancing design workflows and decision-making processes for architects and engineers.

enrichment.name: Vavetek AI
enrichment.raw_address: Singapore, 179433, SG
enrichment.short_description:
Vavetek AI is a Singapore-based SaaS startup founded in 2023, specializing in AI and machine learning solutions for the Architecture, Engineering, and Construction (AEC) industry. The company focuses on optimizing large-scale construction projects by reducing costs, automating processes, and enhancing efficiency. Vavetek AI's headquarters is located at High Street Plaza in Singapore.

The company's flagship product, BAMROC, is an AI-powered copilot designed to automatically detect and resolve clashes in Building Information Modeling (BIM) models, particularly for Mechanical, Electrical, and Plumbing (MEP) systems. BAMROC can resolve up to 94% of clashes in large projects and offers features like rebar congestion detection and 3D modeling automation. Vavetek AI also provides a range of services that include BIM coordination, energy optimization, and workflow automation, all aimed at improving project efficiency and sustainability.
